_docs._description: IO definitions for the RasPin pinball engine. Edit this file to define inputs and outputs.
_docs._usage: Run 'python scripts/generate_io_header.py' to regenerate src/io_defs_generated.h after changes.

_output_fields.id: Unique identifier, must start with IDO_. Used as the #define name in generated header.
_output_fields.idx: Integer array index (0-based, unique). Determines the #define value and g_outputDef[] slot.
_output_fields.name: Human-readable name for console/debug messages.
_output_fields.msg: Output message type. Values: GENERIC_IO | LED | LEDCFG_GROUPDIM | LEDCFG_GROUPBLINK | LEDSET_BRIGHTNESS | LED_SEQUENCE | NEOPIXEL | NEOPIXEL_SEQUENCE
_output_fields.pin: GPIO pin number or pin index for IO/LED expansion chips.
_output_fields.board: Board type. Values: RASPI | IO | LED | NEOPIXEL
_output_fields.boardIdx: Board instance index (0 = first board of that type, 1 = second, etc).
_output_fields.state: Initial pin state. Values: ON | OFF | BLINK | BRIGHTNESS
_output_fields.onMs: On-time in milliseconds for timed outputs (0 = no timing).
_output_fields.offMs: Off-time in milliseconds for timed outputs (0 = no timing).
_output_fields.neo: NeoPixel index within the LED chain (for single-pixel operations, 0 if not applicable).

_input_fields.id: Unique identifier, must start with IDI_. Used as the #define name in generated header.
_input_fields.idx: Integer array index (0-based, unique). Determines the #define value and g_inputDef[] slot.
_input_fields.name: Human-readable name for console/debug messages.
_input_fields.key: Keyboard key for simulator input mapping (single character).
_input_fields.msg: Input message type. Values: BUTTON | SENSOR | TARGET | SLING | POPBUMPER | TIMER | EMPTY
_input_fields.pin: GPIO pin number or pin index for IO expansion chips.
_input_fields.board: Board type. Values: RASPI | IO | LED | NEOPIXEL
_input_fields.boardIdx: Board instance index (0 = first board of that type, 1 = second, etc).
_input_fields.state: Initial pin state. Values: ON | OFF | BLINK | BRIGHTNESS
_input_fields.auto: Boolean. If true, this input automatically triggers an output when activated.
_input_fields.autoOut: ID of the output to auto-trigger (must match an IDO_* id). Empty string if auto is false.
_input_fields.autoState: Pin state to set on the auto-output. Values: ON | OFF | BLINK | BRIGHTNESS
_input_fields.autoPulse: Boolean. If true, auto-output pulses; if false, auto-output tracks input state.
